name: Plant Health Care plc
summary: Plant Health Care plc, together with its subsidiaries, provides agricultural biological products and technology solutions in the Americas, Mexico, and internationally. It offers products to enhance the health, vigor, and yield of field crops, such as corn, soybeans, potatoes, and rice, as well as specialty crops, including fruits and vegetables. The company provides Harpin a√É¬ü, a biostimulant, which stimulates the plant's natural defense systems; and Myconate, a soil treatment solution that stimulates the colonization of plant roots. It also distributes third-party biological products. The company was founded in 1995 and is headquartered in Raleigh, North Carolina.
